creator: stb@lassitu.de
text:
Am 01.06.2010 um 00:35 schrieb Joe Marcus Clarke:

> On 5/31/10 6:21 PM, Stefan Bethke wrote:
>> Here's an improved version: =
http://www.lassitu.de/freebsd/netatalk/netatalk-2.1.1-3.tar.bz2
>>=20
>> This version also changes the MAINTAINER from marcus@freebsd.org to =
stb@lassitu.de, since Marcus appears to be unresponsive.
>=20
> I don't know why you say I'm unresponsive.  I replied to your emails,
> and committed your netatalk work yesterday.

I apologise; I was confused.  It was not meant as an accusation nor to =
take anything away from you, but rather to offer my help if needed.  I =
should have phrased it that way.


Stefan

--=20
Stefan Bethke <stb@lassitu.de>   Fon +49 151 14070811
